title: Lodestone Crafting Update
description: Get the new lodestone crafting recipe with iron in all versions before the change.
body:
Craft Lodestones with the upcoming (1.21.5+) new crafting recipe that uses an Iron ingot instead of a Netherite ingot. 

Versions available for all java versions that have lodestones (1.16 - 1.21.4) so you never have to use Netherite for your lodestone crafting.
